name: Genevieve Vance
quote: Zappy Consults completely rewrote our growth narrative. Their digital transformation roadmap cut our operations cost by 35% while expanding client onboarding speed tenfold. Absolutely revolutionary team.

name: Marcus Thornwood
quote: We had a solid product but zero scaling traction. Zappy helped us rebuild our unit economics and launch dynamic governance strategies that unlocked a 3x average growth multiplier in under five months.
